name: testVerifyPlaceholders
description: Verify that the placeholder text for each field is correct.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field

testStage.description: Verify that the placeholder text for each field is correct.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: all placeholders are correct for each field
